⚡

Prompt Lab Settings

Choose a provider and configure your credentials. All keys are stored locally in extension storage — never sent anywhere except the provider's own API.

A
Anthropic
O
OpenAI
G
Gemini
R
OpenRouter
L
Ollama

Get a key from Google AI Studio.

Enter any model slug from openrouter.ai/models. This is a gateway — use any model from any provider.

Ollama runs locally. No API key needed. Hit ↻ to discover installed models, or type one manually.

Anthropic keys → OpenAI keys → Gemini keys → OpenRouter keys → Ollama models →
